title: Request: Keep Calendar One Way Sync Feature
excerpt:
I have recently learned from chats with Monday support that the Google Calendar one-way sync feature is no longer supported and will be removed at an undetermined time. 
I’d like to request to keep this feature as it is …

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have recently learned from chats with Monday support that the Google Calendar one-way sync feature is no longer supported and will be removed at an undetermined time.

I’d like to request to keep this feature as it is very helpful in creating a completely separate calendar of events. This is such an important feature that the two-way sync integrations does not do as:

  1. The separate calendar allows me to keep my personal calendar free from the clutter. Two-way syncs only adds events to the main/personal calendar, so unless I’m creating multiple Google accounts and linking to each separate sync, my calendar will be filled with a multitude of Monday events + meetings.

  2. Having the separate calendar allows me to share and have my team/stakeholders/clients/etc. to view and subscribe to the calendar, allowing for easy tracking from all parties.

posts.cookedHtml:
